item.title: Fastly BDD
item.description: Fastly is a popular CDN based on the open-source Varnish. This allows to offload a lot of “logic” to the edge compared to traditional CDNs which focus on caching content only. As it supports VCL, you can easily add a lot of custom logic to handle incoming requests right at the edge. This frees up the origin servers from a lot of overhead. Let’s take an example of redirects. Traditionally, they are applied on webservers and often involve not-so-straightforward syntax for complex rules (if you need to check multiple things like referrer, custom headers, cookies etc.
